MINI MINUTES FOR AUG-30-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, CROSS DEFENDANT KAREN LUM'S DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO (1) ALLEGE THE CREATION OF THE TENANCY BY "WRITTEN OR ORAL AGREEMENT, SUB-TENANCY APPROVED BY THE LANDLORD, OR BY SUFFERANCE" SFRO 37.2(F); AND (2) TO ALLEGE FACTS REGARDING SEVERE EMOTIONAL DISTRESS. DEMURRER ON ALL OTHER GROUNDS IS OVERRULED. CROSS-COMPLAINANT SHALL HAVE 10 DAYS FROM THE NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER TO FILE AN AMENDED CROSS-COMPLAINT. ORDER IS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE RONALD EVANS QUIDACHAY, CLERK: M. OLOPERNES, NOT REPORTED

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-06-2014 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. JUDGE CYNTHIA M. LEE; Clerk JLee. Proceedings not reported. (610)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-11-2013 Continued To Dec-04-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-26-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Lien L. Uy, Esq. of Uy Law Group, (510-893-3294), for Karen Lum, Plaintiff and moving party.
No appearance by Defendant and opposing party.

Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: CROSS DEFENDANT KAREN LUM's DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND to (1) allege the creation of the tenancy by "written or oral agreement, sub-tenancy approved by the landlord, or by sufferance" SFRO 37.2(f); and (2) to allege facts regarding severe emotional distress. Demurrer on all other grounds is overruled. Cross-Complainant shall have 10 days from the Notice of Entry of Order to file an amended cross-complaint. Order is signed in open court. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)

DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-30-2013 Continued To Sep-26-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. CROSS DEFENDANT KAREN LUM'S DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT is transferred to Department 501, the Real Property/Housing Court, to be heard on September 26, 2013, at 9:30 a.m. See Local Rule 8.10. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
